summary.shape_sentence: Early RTH upside drive, midday high-base rotation, then late-day lower-high fade into a still-green close.

goat.note: No visible GOAT icon; visually the standout move was the opening upside drive from roughly 25,925 to 26,015.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels; bearish behavior appeared as failed pushes near 26,120–26,150 and the late-day breakdown after about 15:35.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels; bullish behavior concentrated in the opening reclaim and early continuation above 26,040–26,060.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; effective supply was around 26,120–26,150, repeatedly tested and respected into the afternoon fade.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; effective demand was around 26,040–26,060 and was retested into the close.

time_markers.10am_blue: Already above the open after the morning drive, consolidating near 26,060.
time_markers.12pm_red: Trading near the upper distribution around 26,130–26,145.
time_markers.2pm_green: Elevated but no longer expanding, rotating around 26,110–26,125.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 26,060 after a late fade, still green versus the RTH open.

takeaway: Bullish opening-drive day with an upper-range midday base and a late fade; trend-up morning, stalled afternoon, green close despite failure to hold near HOD.
